# Let's open and read the provided text file
path = '/mnt/data/file-21qNgYU1QiRxPhr555frnt-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:1000]

text = open('/mnt/data/file-21qNgYU1QiRxPhr555frnt-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

# Find segments enclosed by single asterisks *...*
segments = []
i = 0
n = len(text)
in_segment = False
start = None
while i < n:
    if text[i] == '*':
        # Check if it's part of a ** double asterisk (bold)
        if i+1 < n and text[i+1] == '*':
            # skip both asterisks as they belong to bold markers
            i += 2
            continue
        # single asterisk
        if not in_segment:
            in_segment = True
            start = i
            i += 1
            continue
        else:
            # closing asterisk
            end = i
            in_segment = False
            # content is text[start+1:end]
            segments.append((start, end, text[start+1:end]))
            i += 1
            continue
    else:
        i += 1

segments

queries: "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فَلَبِثَ فِيهِمْ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا خَمْسِينَ عَامًا"

text = open('/mnt/data/file-21qNgYU1QiRxPhr555frnt-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()
phrase = "دعوة نوح لقومه دامت **950 عامًا**"
start_idx = text.find(phrase)
start_idx, phrase, text[start_idx:start_idx+len(phrase)] if start_idx!=-1 else None

text = open('/mnt/data/file-21qNgYU1QiRxPhr555frnt-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()
# compute italic spans content excluding asterisks and initial quote if any
segments_positions = []
for start, end, content in segments:
    s = start + 1
    e = end
    # Exclude leading double quote if present
    if s < len(text) and text[s] == '"':
        s += 1
    seg_text = text[s:e]
    segments_positions.append((s, e, seg_text))

segments_positions

phrase = "دعوة نوح لقومه دامت **950 عامًا**"
start_idx = text.find(phrase)
end_idx = start_idx + len(phrase) if start_idx != -1 else -1
start_idx, end_idx, text[start_idx:end_idx]

text = open('/mnt/data/file-21qNgYU1QiRxPhr555frnt-text_to_analyse.txt','r',encoding='utf-8').read()

citations = []

# paraphrase of 29:14
phrase = "دعوة نوح لقومه دامت **950 عامًا**"
start_idx = text.find(phrase)
if start_idx != -1:
    citations.append({
        "span_start": start_idx,
        "span_end": start_idx + len(phrase),
        "span_text": phrase,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {
            "sura_name": "العنكبوت",
            "sura_number": 29,
            "aya_number": 14
        },
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    })

# italic segments from earlier parsed positions
segments_positions = [(172,350,'وَإِذْ أَخَذَ رَبُّكَ مِنْ بَنِي آدَمَ مِنْهُمْ أَزْوَاجَهُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَهُمْ نُورًا يَعْرِفُونَهُ وَجَعَلَ لَهُمْ أَسْمَاءً أَزْوَاجًا وَجَعَلَ لَهُمْ مِنْ شَجَرَةِ الْزَّقُّومِ'),
                      (356,521,'وَكَذَلِكَ أَخْرَجْنَاهُمْ مِنْ أَصْلِهِمْ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا مِنْ سَمَاءٍ فَأَصْبَحُوا بِهِ فِي الْمَزَارِعِ فَكَانَ عَلَى رَبِّكَ كَلِمَةً مُؤَكَّدَةً'),
                      (527,692,'وَكَذَلِكَ أَخْرَجْنَاهُمْ مِنْ أَصْلِهِمْ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا مِنْ سَمَاءٍ فَأَصْبَحُوا بِهِ فِي الْمَزَارِعِ فَكَانَ عَلَى رَبِّكَ كَلِمَةً مُؤَكَّدَةً'),
                      (698,863,'وَكَذَلِكَ أَخْرَجْنَاهُمْ مِنْ أَصْلِهِمْ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا مِنْ سَمَاءٍ فَأَصْبَحُوا بِهِ فِي الْمَزَارِعِ فَكَانَ عَلَى رَبِّكَ كَلِمَةً مُؤَكَّدَةً')
                     ]

for s,e,seg_text in segments_positions:
    # Validate the extracted substring equals seg_text
    assert text[s:e] == seg_text
    citations.append({
        "span_start": s,
        "span_end": e,
        "span_text": seg_text,
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    })

# prepare JSON object
output_obj = {"citations": citations}
import json, textwrap
json.dumps(output_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)[:1000]

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
